description: ID1 (Ulam) — CGS from a random walk. ParticlePath, random walks, Monte Carlo, physical units from pure mathematics. Includes Lean proofs, EGPTMath implementations, original author references, and demo source.
header:
# EGPT — ID1: Ulam's Idea (CGS from a Random Walk)

> Physical units emerge from pure mathematics via random walks.
> This file contains all primary artifacts for Idea #1.
> For the full framework: https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/IDEAS.md
>
> Key claim: The Centimeter-Gram-Second system can be reconstructed from a random walk.
> Ulam proposed this in 'Physics for Mathematicians' (pub. posthumously 1986, ed. Rota).
> In EGPT, this becomes ParticlePath = List Bool = the foundation of all number theory.

files.note: PPF encoding — JS implementation of ParticlePath ↔ ℕ
Ulam's posthumous book — 'Physics for Mathematicians' essay
Analytical derivation: inverse-square law from random walks
